title: Text us about your experience with airport security lines | CNN
text:
Are you flying from an airport in the United States on Monday, March 23? CNN is looking for travelers who are willing to text us to share their experiences, along with possible videos.

We’re looking for passengers who can text us at key moments in the security line – just like you would message a friend or family member.

If you’re interested in participating, use the form below to submit your name, flight and contact information.

See Full Web Article
